name: Itty Bitty Titty Committee
description:
When your petite girlfriend finds out you have a BBW fetish, will you reassure her she is enough for you, or will you slide her the Haagen Dazs?

If you copy/rework one of my bots,

please throw a link in the comments for the

original to your take on the character.

I want to be able to check it out

and hopefully see the improvements!
